---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new provider
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Before you start**
llmrouter is intentionally a lean, single-binary routing layer rather than an LLMOps platform. Please skim the "Why llmrouter" and "Design choices" sections of the README and the Scope section of CONTRIBUTING.md — a few things (request-level retries, cost/quality-based routing, spend tracking, a UI) are deliberately out of scope.

**The problem**
What are you trying to do that llmrouter doesn't currently support?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new provider, link its API docs and note whether it's OpenAI-compatible.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you've tried or other ways this could be solved (including in your client).
